violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed hamburger chubs stored on the floor in the walk in cooler.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Observed Single use to go boxes stored on the floor in the storage room.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. The wall next to the chest freezers is not finished.
